name: Ayame Ikaruga
description: Ayame is a freshman in high school and Ibuki's younger sister. She has a shy, tsundere personality and is acutely aware of her small breasts when compared to those of her siblings. It took a while for her to like Yoichi romantically and she tries to help him at times while saying it was for no particular reason. She is bad with household chores in general. She dislikes being compared to Ibuki as she is constantly overshadowed. She has kissed Yoichi twice while he was unconscious during the perfo

name: Azuki Shinatsu
description: She is one of the four students to be selected to show how to duel on the first day. She uses air magic, which she uses shoes to allow her to be in mid-flight. Also she is a member of the Maken-ki club which calms down disturbances in the co-ed school.

name: Binkan
description: Binkan is just an innocent bystander who is often nearby whenever SOX performs another act of ero-terrorism, staring at their latest handiwork. She is hardly acknowledged by the main characters until the final episode where it is shown that she is a prefect in training under the leadership of Oboro. Binkan's real name is never mentioned; her nickname roughly translates to "little sensitive (girl)." (Source: Wikipedia)
mediaTitles: SHIMONETA: A Boring World Where the Concept of Dirty Jokes Doesn’t Exist
searchTerms: SHIMONETA: A Boring World Where the Concept of Dirty Jokes Doesn’t Exist

name: Biscuit Griffon
nativeName: ビスケット・グリフォン
description: A boy who takes on the role of strategic advisor to Orga. Mild-mannered, his favorite hobby is reading. He enlists in CGS in order to support his grandmother and younger twin sister. Having attended school, he is literate—a rarity among the boys. (Source: Gundam.info)
mediaTitles: Mobile Suit GUNDAM Iron Blooded Orphans

name: Boiled
description: Boiled is an assassin obsessed with being "hard boiled" and works for the assassin agency Dodenkai with [Obiguro.](https://anilist.co/character/348935/Obiguro) He knew [Sakamoto](https://anilist.co/character/196522/Tarou-Sakamoto) at the JCC and uses ball bombs to fight.

name: Celestine Baudelaire

description: Celestine Baudelaire is the head of the Made's Association in Faltra City.

name: Chaos
description: Introduced as the "Second Generation Angeloid, Type Epsilon", Chaos is the first major antagonist introduced after the Synapse. Ironically the most minute and child-like Angeloid, weighing 19 kilograms and being only 107 cm in height, she appears as a young child dressed in nun-like garments which can manipulate her appearance through elaborated illusions, mimicking someone dear to her victim in order to instill turmoil and confusion, as she did against Nymph by taking on the likeness of Tomoki.

name: Chihaya Asagumo
description: Girlfriend of [Mitsuki Ayano](https://anilist.co/character/341640). A warm-hearted girl with a hidden jealous side.

name: Cirucci Thunderwitch
nativeName: チルッチ・サンダーウィッチ
description: Cirucci Thunderwitch dresses akin to the gothic lolita style of Japanese fashion. Her outfit consists of a frilly dress, large poofy sleeves that cut off at her shoulder, short purple-colored hair, teardrop markings on each cheek, and knee-high boots. Cirucci has wings on her back, but it is unclear if they are part of her outfit or something else. The remains of her hollow mask are positioned in her hair right above the left side of her forehead and resemble a spiked hairpin. Despite her rather

name: Danny
description: Minor character appearing in Phantom Blood. He is Jonathan Joestar's dog and childhood best friend. George Joestar I bought Danny when he was a puppy when Jonathan was five years old. Danny was very afraid of unfamiliar places and strange people causing him to bite Jonathan when the young boy first approached him. name: Emonzaemon Souda
description: A faithful follower of Princess Hitei, he's been informing her about Togame's adventures for some time. A rather quiet person, he sits in on Princess Hitei's boastful conversations. He shows little emotion and does not get along well with Togame. He has long red hair that's bound in a ponytail and a tall height and wears a tuxedo-like uniform. name: Ena
description: __Height:__ 165 cm A cautious, yet strong-willed cupid. Having a fair amount of experience, Ena is determined to make sure the job of matchmaking is done well.

name: Enju
description: Kaede's elder twin. They both use a spear and wakizashi in battle, they're both friendly and mischievous, but Enju feels he's more dependable than his younger brother.

name: Erika Kose
description: She is a member of the mass media club at Shuchi'in Academy.

name: Femt
description: Sadistic and clearly insane, Femt lives for excitement & can't stand anything 'normal'. In a city full of people willing to start their own millenium reich, even Zapp acknowledges that Femt is the worst. (Source: Kekkai Sensen Wiki)

name: Fuuro
description: Fuuro is the Gym Leader of Fukiyose City's Gym, known officially as the Fukiyose Gym. She specializes in Flying-type Pokémon. Her Pokémon are: Swanna, Kokoromori and Kenhallow.

name: Gaap
description: The 33rd highest ranking earl of hell named after the demon of the same name. She is a curly-haired woman who wears a red dress and a hat with a pink bow. Quite flamboyant, Gaap loves to tease people and give people random nicknames by shortening their names ("Riiche" for Beatrice, "Lia" for Virgilia, etc.).
